---
title: "test_generated_contract.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/contracts/test_generated_contract.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.68
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.58
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestContract_example, setUp. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [io](file://io)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest](file://unittest)

### Exports
- `TestContract_example`
- `setUp`
- `tearDown`
- `test_transition`
